name: BB:UBA : Successful File Upload
notes: This rule detects all the successful file upload events (HTTP, FTP)
bb_references: BB:UBA : Successful File Upload on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.FTP Action Allowed, Access.Firewall Session Opened, Access.Access Permitted
when the destination port is one of the following 443, 80, 21
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Successful File Upload on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.FTP Action Allowed, Access.Firewall Session Opened, Access.Access Permitted
AND when the destination port is one of the following 443, 80, 21
